trustSignals: Fast diagnosis for common brand faults

cta.heading: Book a local boiler repair visit
cta.text: Call now or book online for help with leaks, fault codes, ignition faults and heating problems.

faq.question: Do you work on older boilers as well as newer models?
faq.answer: We help with many common domestic boilers, but availability of parts and the condition of the appliance will affect the repair options.

faq.question: Can you help if the boiler is showing a fault code?
faq.answer: Yes. Fault codes are useful clues, but they still need proper diagnosis because the same code can have more than one cause.

faq.question: How do I know if repair is better than replacement?
faq.answer: That depends on the age of the boiler, the cost of parts and whether the appliance has a history of repeat failures.
